analysis.reasoning: The tweet is a brief, factual report about a UN process (Russia-sponsored resolution on combating glorification of Nazism) and notes limited opposition by the US and Ukraine. It does not explicitly promote any of the listed strategic narratives (no framing of the West as immoral, no claim of Russia leading an alternative system, no portrayal of Russia as a benevolent partner, etc.). It functions as an informational update with anti-Nazism remembrance hashtags rather than propagandistic narrative promotion.
